concerns.text: FR-006 (Sensitivity Analysis) and FR-007 (Permutation Test) are not fully covered. Task T044 (Sensitivity) is marked incomplete `[ ]` and T045 (Permutation) is marked incomplete `[ ]`. The spec requires these to be implemented to satisfy SC-002 and SC-003. Without these tasks being actionable (checked or detailed), the core statistical validation requirements are missing implementation coverage.

FR-007 (Permutation Test) requires a block-permutation test on the User-Track Pair dataset. Task T045 is marked incomplete `[ ]`. The spec mandates this test to calculate a p-value against a null distribution. The absence of a completed task for this critical statistical method means the FR is not covered by an implementable task.

FR-006 (Sensitivity Analysis) requires re-running the matching and aggregation process with different Levenshtein thresholds. Task T044 is marked incomplete `[ ]`. The spec requires this to ensure result stability. The lack of a completed task for this loop means the FR is not covered.

SC-004 (Match Rate Threshold) requires the pipeline to verify the match rate and log a warning if below threshold. Task T036 implements this check, but it is listed as a dependency for T033/T034 (Modeling). However, T036 is in Phase 4 (US2) while T033/T034 are in Phase 5 (US3). The dependency chain is present, but the task T036 itself is marked `[X]` (complete). Wait, T036 is marked `[X]`. Re-evaluating: T036 is complete. However, T038 (Generate regression_summary.csv) and T039 (Generate sensitivity/permutation results) are marked `[ ]` (incomplete). The output artifacts for FR-006 and FR-007 are missing task coverage for generation.

T038 (Generate regression_summary.csv) and T039 (Generate sensitivity_analysis.csv and permutation_results.csv) are marked incomplete `[ ]`. These tasks are required to produce the output artifacts defined in Spec Section 6 (Output Artifacts) for FR-006 and FR-007. Without these tasks being actionable, the spec's output requirements are not covered.

T050 (Verify Artifacts) depends on T029 (Generate user_track_pairs.parquet). T029 is marked incomplete `[ ]`. If T029 is not implemented, T050 cannot run, and the verification of the User-Track Pair artifact (required by FR-004 and FR-005) is not covered by a completed task.

T053 (Calculate Effect Size) and T054 (Validate Assumptions) are marked incomplete `[ ]`. While not explicitly named as FRs, they are critical for the 'Statistical Modeling' phase (US3) and the 'Output Artifacts' (regression_summary.csv). The spec implies a complete statistical analysis. The absence of these tasks leaves the 'Modeling' phase incomplete regarding standard statistical reporting (effect sizes, assumption checks).

Task T045 description mentions 'shuffle the residualized_exposure_score values among unique track_id's'. The spec FR-007 requires shuffling 'among tracks' while preserving the User-Track Pair structure. The task description is slightly ambiguous and risks implementing a flawed shuffle. This is a writing issue in the task description that needs clarification to ensure it matches the spec's block-permutation requirement.
